data.title: CEO of Havoc AI, Paul Lwin, joins WP Intelligence Council for maritime autonomy. Aug. 8, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: Havoc AI, a prominent player in maritime autonomy based in Providence, R.I., made a significant announcement on August 8, 2025. The Co-Founder and CEO, Paul Lwin, has been appointed to the WP Intelligence Council by the Washington Post. This council offers a fresh leadership avenue for Lwin as he continues to steer Havoc AI's groundbreaking initiatives in the industry.

data.title: Wendy's Q2 2025: Global sales $3.7B (-1.8%), Int'l sales +8.7%, 26 new restaurants added, on track for 2-3% net unit growth.
data.description: The worldwide sales for the company reached $3.7 billion, marking a slight decline of 1.8% compared to the previous period. On the international front, there was a significant growth of 8.7% in systemwide sales, observed across all regions. The company successfully added 26 new restaurants during this time frame and is progressing as planned to achieve a net growth in units ranging between 2% to 3% for the entire fiscal year. The reported diluted earnings per share, along with adjusted metrics, demonstrate positive performance and indicate a stable financial outlook for the company.

data.title: BrainStorm will announce Q2 financial results on August 14, 2025, at 8:30 AM Eastern Time. Leading developer of adult stem cell therapeutics for neurodegenerative diseases.
data.description: BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics Inc., a prominent developer of adult stem cell therapeutics for neurodegenerative diseases, has scheduled a conference call for August 14, 2025, at 8:30 AM Eastern Time. The call will be held by the company, known by its ticker symbol OTCQB: BCLI. The announcement was made on August 8, 2025, in New York.

data.title: Calumet reports a Q2 2025 net loss of $147.9 million and an adjusted EBITDA of $76.5 million. Cost reductions exceeding plan by $42 million.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, there was a reported net loss of $147.9 million, translating to a basic loss of $1.70 per common share. On a more positive note, the Adjusted EBITDA with Tax Attributes for the same period was $76.5 million. The company has been actively implementing cost-cutting measures, which have proven successful as they have already saved $42 million in operating expenses compared to the previous year.

data.title: Illumine Financial Partners joins MassMutual SC for expanded financial planning capabilities. Led by David Horine and Andrew Schmidt.
data.description: In a recent development on August 8, 2025, MassMutual of South Carolina has announced a new addition to their team with Illumine Financial Partners, headed by David Horine, ChFC®, ChSNC® and Andrew Schmidt, joining forces. This financial planning practice based in Charleston will now be operating under MassMutual of South Carolina.

data.title: RBL LLC receives investment from Modi Ventures, with Sahir Ali joining RBL's board of directors. Venture creation talks planned.
data.description: A significant investment has been made to support RBL's goal of launching and expanding innovative startups. Sahir Ali, the founder and general partner of Modi Ventures, will be joining the RBL board of directors. Both Ali from Modi Ventures and Wotton, the managing partner at RBL, are set to discuss venture creation at the upcoming Canaccord Genuity Growth event. This partnership is set to drive growth and create opportunities in the venture creation space.

data.title: Flutter Entertainment plc launches 4th tranche of share repurchase program with Davy Securities UC, up to $245 million Buyback.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Flutter Entertainment plc, a prominent online sports betting and iGaming operator, disclosed a strategic move. The company has engaged with Davy Securities UC to execute non-discretionary plans. These arrangements involve Flutter repurchasing its ordinary shares through the New York Stock Exchange. The buyback program has an overall limit of $245 million. This initiative solidifies Flutter's commitment to its shareholders and signifies a significant financial commitment.

data.title: Second Life EV Battery Market to hit 330-350 GWH by 2030, with 65% CAGR. Significant growth from 25-30 GWH in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of August 8, 2025, the second-life electric vehicle (EV) battery market is forecasted to be around 25-30 gigawatt-hours (GWH) in 2025. It is expected to significantly increase to approximately 330-350 GWH by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 65% over the forecasted period. These projections come from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets. The surge in adoption of second-life EV batteries is driving this upward trend.

data.title: Under Armour reports Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Aug 8, 2025; period ended June 30, 2025. NYSE: UAA, UA.
data.description: In Baltimore on August 8, 2025, the publicly traded company Under Armour, Inc. (NYSE: UAA, UA) released its unaudited financial figures for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, concluding on June 30, 2025. The organization adheres to generally accepted accounting principles when reporting its financial results.

data.title: Capstone Copper Corp. to construct Mantoverde Optimized project boosting throughput from 32,000 to 45,000.
data.description: Capstone Copper Corp. has received approval to proceed with the Mantoverde Optimized project, valued at $XX million, for the construction phase. This project, known as MV Optimized, will expand the sulphide concentrator at Mantoverde to increase throughput from 32,000 to 45,000 units. This expansion is set to enhance operational efficiency and is deemed a significant milestone for the company. The project has obtained all necessary Board approvals and marks a strategic move for Capstone.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor's revenue skyrocketed 22.5% to 323.17 billion NT dollars in July 2025, reaching 2.1 trillion NT dollars from Jan to Jul, with a 37.6% Y/Y growth. The stock rose by 23% YTD, and benefitted from exemptions in Trump's tariff proposal.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSM) reported consolidated net revenue of approximately 323.17 billion New Taiwanese dollars (roughly $10.66 billion) for July 2025, up 22.5% quarter-over-quarter and 25.8% year-over-year. The company's revenue for January through July 2025 reached 2.1 trillion New Taiwanese dollars (roughly $69.3 billion), rising 37.6% year-over-year. Taiwan Semiconductor stock gained 23% year-to-date. Taiwan Semiconductor jumped ~5% in overnight trade after being exempted from proposed 100% tariffs on semiconductor chips by President Donald Trump, easing investor concerns. The exemption was granted due to the company's U.S. operations, including fabrication plants in Arizona under its $165 billion investment commitment.

data.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: ANIP) announces record Q2 2025 results, raises guidance, and discusses business highlights.
data.description: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Baudette, Minnesota, released their financial results and business updates for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The company, listed as ANIP on the Nasdaq stock exchange, shared the information on August 8, 2025.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up, AppLovin, Robinhood show buy signals. Sezzle, MP Materials big movers. Stock market fades Thursday.
data.description: On Thursday, the stock market experienced a decline despite seeing gains in the chip sector. However, AppLovin and Robinhood showed signals indicating a good time to buy. Sezzle and MP Materials were notable movers towards the end of the trading day. Dow Jones Futures showed an increase amid significant earnings announcements in the market. The news was first reported by Investor's Business Daily.
